questions.question: The task asks to create tests at frontend/src/features/market/DiscussionThread.test.tsx (co-located), but comprehensive tests already exist at frontend/src/__tests__/DiscussionThread.test.tsx covering all 16 scenarios. Should we move/copy the existing tests to the co-located path, or does the existing test file already satisfy this task?
questions.why_it_matters: All requested test scenarios (rendering comment list, empty state, loading state, error state, comment submission, disabled composer for non-active markets, character count display, disabled when no session) are already implemented and passing in the existing test file. Creating a duplicate at a different path would cause redundancy.

questions.question: The existing project convention places ALL test files in frontend/src/__tests__/ (41 test files). The task description specifies frontend/src/features/market/DiscussionThread.test.tsx which breaks this convention. Should we follow the existing convention or the task description path?
questions.why_it_matters: Consistency with the codebase convention matters for maintainability. All other tests follow the centralized __tests__/ pattern. Moving just one test to co-located would create an inconsistency.

assumptions.assumption: The existing test file at frontend/src/__tests__/DiscussionThread.test.tsx already fully satisfies the task requirements since it covers all 8 specified scenarios with 16 tests total.
assumptions.if_wrong: We would need to identify missing test scenarios and add them, or create a separate co-located test file.

assumptions.assumption: The task was written before the tests were implemented in the prior child task (bayes-comments-001-execute-impl-child-1), so this is effectively already done.
assumptions.if_wrong: There may be additional test scenarios beyond what was implemented that need to be added.

assumptions.assumption: The tests currently pass with vitest since they were committed in the prior child task.
assumptions.if_wrong: We would need to fix any failing tests before marking this task complete.
